'''âk-n-l-g''' ('''kakanlegoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zest|zest]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-n-l-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zest|zest]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-n-l-g
|-
! Lemma
| kakanlegoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikanlegoko|thikanlegoko]] || [[word:jikanlegoko|jikanlegoko]] || [[word:shikanlegoko|shikanlegoko]] || [[word:kikanlegoko|kikanlegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukanlegoko|thuthukanlegoko]] || [[word:jujukanlegoko|jujukanlegoko]] || [[word:shushukanlegoko|shushukanlegoko]] || [[word:kukukanlegoko|kukukanlegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukanlegoko|thukanlegoko]] || [[word:jukanlegoko|jukanlegoko]] || [[word:shukanlegoko|shukanlegoko]] || [[word:kukanlegoko|kukanlegoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokanlegoko|thothokanlegoko]] || [[word:jojokanlegoko|jojokanlegoko]] || [[word:shoshokanlegoko|shoshokanlegoko]] || [[word:kokokanlegoko|kokokanlegoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokanlegoko|thokanlegoko]] || [[word:jokanlegoko|jokanlegoko]] || [[word:shokanlegoko|shokanlegoko]] || [[word:kokanlegoko|kokanlegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŚkanlegoko|thĂŚkanlegoko]] || [[word:jĂŚkanlegoko|jĂŚkanlegoko]] || [[word:shĂŚkanlegoko|shĂŚkanlegoko]] || [[word:kĂŚkanlegoko|kĂŚkanlegoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
